headline: Hidden AI chip supplier poised to blow past Wall Street targets
summary: Lam Research has quietly become one of the biggest winners of the AI buildout, and Wall Street has noticed. The chip equipment maker reports fiscal fourth-quarter earnings on July 29, 2026, and analysts are already lining up with a hard-to-miss message. That message comes straight from the people ...
